category_sources: source_facts.description says this is the command-line tool for Vespa.ai; official Vespa docs describe Vespa as big data, real-time, open source with deployment, feeding, querying, and document operations.
display_name_sources: Official docs page title is Vespa CLI; source_facts.name is vespa-cli.
docs_sources: Official Vespa documentation includes a CLI client guide and command reference pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already populated with https://github.com/vespa-engine/vespa; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Vespa.ai CLI; official docs list cloning sample apps, deploying, feeding, querying documents, and custom authenticated requests.
